accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to access overlays. "Moderation" access level or higher is required.

header.title: Overlays
header.subtitle: Manage visual overlays for your Twitch stream

shoutout.name: Shoutouts (!so)
shoutout.description: Visual overlay to shoutout other streamers showing their latest clip and profile
features: Full customization of colors and texts

timer.name: Timer
timer.description: On-screen timer with event alerts, visual progress and full customization

giveaway.name: Giveaway
giveaway.description: Live giveaway system with animations and chat participation

soundAlerts.name: Sound Alerts
soundAlerts.description: Custom audio/video alerts for channel points redemptions

gacha.name: Gacha
gacha.description: Random reward system with visual animations for your stream
